global.description: The ad features a blue background with various shapes and text promoting a cashback offer.
global.main_message: Promoting cashback offers with a call to action.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background that fills the top portion of the ad.

elements.label: Circular and rectangular shapes
elements.description: A large circular shape and a rectangular shape in the center, both in a lighter shade of blue.

elements.label: Additional circular shape
elements.description: Another circular shape overlapping with the main subject, also in a lighter blue.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A medium-sized rectangular shape positioned slightly above the center, in a lighter blue.

elements.label: Large circular shape
elements.description: A large circular shape positioned in the center, filled with a lighter blue color.

elements.label: Small circular shape
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom left, in a lighter blue.

elements.label: Medium circular shape
elements.description: A medium-sized circular shape located towards the bottom center, in a lighter blue.

elements.label: Large circular shape
elements.description: A large circular shape located towards the bottom right, in a lighter blue.

elements.label: Cashback offer text
elements.description: Bold white text at the bottom of the ad stating 'Earn cashback daily No hidden fees €9.99 Install now'.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily No hidden fees €9.99 Install now

elements.label: SwiftStack logo
elements.description: A white logo text 'SwiftStack' positioned at the top left of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, main subjects are centered, and the body text is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: SwiftStack, Earn cashback daily, No hidden fees, €9.99, Install now
